column1: # FILTER(range, include, [if_empty]) — keep rows whose mask is truthy (M1).
# Format: id<TAB>formula<TAB>setup<TAB>expected. An empty result with no
# if_empty grounds Excel's #CALC! to #N/A; with if_empty it returns that value.
# The host cell holds the first kept row's top-left; `expected` projects it.
